allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; deps=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'],p.get\('source'\),p.get\('description',{}\).get\('path',''\)\) for p in deps.get\('packages',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; cfg=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'],p.get\('rootUri',''\)\) for p in cfg.get\('packages',[]\) if p['name']=='gg']")
